objective: In glitchlab/auditor/task_writer.py, find where mode: surgical is being added to task_data and remove it. The Task Pydantic model only accepts 'maintenance' or 'evolution' for the mode field. Do not add mode to task_data at all — the surgical pipeline is triggered by the --surgical CLI flag, not a task YAML field. Only touch glitchlab/auditor/task_writer.py. Verify: python -m ruff check glitchlab/auditor/task_writer.py && python -m pytest tests/ -x -q
commit_message: fix(auditor): stop writing surgical mode into generated task data
implementation_summary: Removed the code in glitchlab/auditor/task_writer.py that injected mode='surgical' into task_data. Ruff passes for the touched file. Full pytest verification did not pass due to an unrelated pre-existing failure in tests/agents/test_implementer_run_check_success_message.py within glitchlab/agents/implementer.py.

data.description: Tests that TaskWriter creates a task YAML through its public write_tasks flow without injecting a mode field, preventing invalid mode='surgical' task data from being written.
